channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Railway Minister Inspects New Amrit Bharat Coaches Featuring Modern Interiors
item.description: Due to access restrictions, the specifics of the news article are unavailable. However, based on the title, it likely describes an inspection by the Railway Minister of the newly designed ‘Amrit Bhara...

item.title: Tanzania Economy Grows to 6% in Q3 2025 Driven by Investments and Reforms
item.description: The Prime Minister of Tanzania, Mwigulu Nchemba, announced that the country's economy is keeping a solid growth path, rising to 6.0% in the third quarter of 2025 compared to 5.5% in the same period la...

item.title: Essendon Shows Fight in Second Half Against Western Bulldogs Despite Continued Losing Streak
item.description: Essendon experienced a rare bright spot during a tough night at Marvel Stadium, managing to hold the undefeated Western Bulldogs goalless for a single quarter in a clash that initially looked like ano...

item.title: South African Investors See Retail Recovery in Hammersons' Performance
item.description: A recent analysis reveals a surprising resurgence in the retail sector, particularly highlighted by the performance of Hammersons, a company listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange. The narrative th...

item.title: Kogi State Mourns Passing of High Court Judge Yahaya Adamu
item.description: The people of Kogi State dey mourn as Justice Yahaya Adamu of the Kogi State High Court don pass on. The state government describe the loss as heavy for both the judiciary and the wider legal communit...

item.title: Authorities seize high-powered firearms after clash between rival Moro groups in Maguindanao del Sur
item.description: Soldiers and police officers confiscated a number of military-grade weapons and ammunition following an armed clash between two rival Moro groups in Datu Piang, Maguindanao del Sur on April 4, 2026. T...

item.title: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie Retain Titles Amid Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor Scandal

item.title: UConn and Michigan advance to NCAA men's basketball final
item.description: UConn and Michigan have both secured spots in the NCAA men's basketball championship game, setting the stage for an exciting matchup. UConn defeated Illinois 71-62, thanks in part to freshman Braylon ...

item.title: Government cancels toll tax increase to ease public burden amid rising petrol prices
item.description: The Federal Government of Pakistan has decided to withdraw the planned increase in toll taxes on national highways and motorways, following directives from Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. The National ...

item.title: 7 Nutritious Foods That Provide More Protein Than Eggs
item.description: This article highlights seven everyday foods that actually contain more protein per 100 grams than the average egg, which gives about 6 grams of protein. Eggs are still good and affordable, but these ...

item.title: Pakistan Navy commissions PNS Khaibar, highlights strategic modernisation and maritime defence

item.title: Cleric Explains True Meaning and Importance of Easter
item.description: Tanzanians, particularly Christians, are preparing to celebrate Easter after the 40-day Lenten period of fasting, prayer, and almsgiving. Easter is a key season in the Catholic liturgical calendar, ce...

item.title: Northern CAN urges Christians to protect themselves after Jos Palm Sunday attack
item.description: After the tragic Palm Sunday attack in Angwan Rukuba, Jos North, Plateau State, where over 20 people were killed, the Christian Association of Nigeria (CAN) has urged Christians in Northern Nigeria to...

item.title: Railways unveil upgraded Amrit Bharat train coaches with modern interiors and improved safety

item.title: Britons become more cautious and passive on social media amid mental health concerns, Ofcom finds
item.description: Recent data from Ofcom indicates that British adults are becoming less active on social media, with only 49% now posting, sharing or commenting compared with 61% in 2024. This shift suggests that many...

item.title: Kenya drafts regulations to license and oversee cryptocurrency service providers
item.description: Kenya has moved a step closer to regulating its fast-growing cryptocurrency and digital assets sector, following the development of draft regulations meant to operationalize the Virtual Asset Service ...
